name: Mcpherson Co-Op
description_short: McPherson College is a liberal arts institution in Kansas offering undergraduate degree programs, not a consumer finance company. The website URL was misidentified in the profile setup.
description_long: McPherson College is a private liberal arts college located in McPherson, Kansas, founded to provide higher education centered on knowledge and craft. The institution serves approximately 800+ students from 33 states and 7 countries across eight residential facilities. It is not a financial services provider, payday lender, credit union, or any form of consumer finance company. The college's website details its academic programs, admissions process, financial aid options for students, campus life, and strategic initiatives—not consumer financial products or services. The college offers a range of undergraduate degree programs including its nationally unique bachelor's degree in automotive restoration, programs in art and design, health sciences, natural sciences, and other liberal arts majors. Students can receive up to $25,000 in merit scholarships based on GPA, and the institution reports that 24% of participants in its Student Debt Project graduate with zero debt. The college provides traditional higher education services: admissions, financial aid counseling, academic advising, career services with a 97% job and graduate school placement rate, campus visits, and student life programming including 40+ clubs and organizations. McPherson College distinguishes itself through its specialized automotive restoration program, which was featured on CBS Sunday Morning and has achieved recognition at prestigious venues like the Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance. The college emphasizes a "Community by Design" approach with small class sizes, personal mentoring from faculty, and integration of entrepreneurial mindset throughout its curriculum. It has established strategic initiatives including a $1 billion endowment campaign and programs focused on wellness, inclusion, and academic growth. This is fundamentally an educational institution, not a consumer finance company. The listing on CreditDoc appears to be a data entry error. McPherson College does not offer financial products such as loans, credit services, banking products, or alternative financial services to the general public. Any inclusion in a consumer finance database is inappropriate and misleading to consumers seeking actual financial services.
